evals.name: html-quick
evals.prompt: Tôi cần dựng deck cho buổi chia sẻ nội bộ tuần sau về 'AI trong quy trình tuyển dụng', khoảng 8 slide, làm nhanh gọn, mở file là chạy được không cần cài đặt gì.
evals.expected_output: A single self-contained index.html plain-HTML deck (~8 slides) that opens in a browser with no build step, with bottom navigation slider + slide counter, projection-legible typography, and no input/forms.
assertions: Produces a single self-contained index.html that runs by opening it in a browser (no build step, no npm install required)
Contains roughly 8 slides on the topic of AI in recruitment
Has a visible bottom navigation control (prev/next or dot strip) AND a slide number/counter
Slide body text is projection-legible: does not use web-reading sizes (text-sm, text-base, 16px, 1rem) for slide body content; titles are large
Contains no text input, textarea, form, or Submit/Save controls (presenter-only interaction)

evals.name: react-substantial
evals.prompt: Làm cho tôi một presentation website xịn về 'Context Engineering' để đi nói ở hội thảo. Nhiều slide, có animation, và tôi sẽ chỉnh sửa, tái dùng nhiều lần về sau.
evals.expected_output: A Vite + React + TypeScript project with Tailwind + Framer Motion, an App -> Deck -> Slide architecture, multiple slide components registered in a slides index, a navigation slider + counter, projection-legible type, and no forms.
assertions: Creates a Vite + React + TypeScript project (package.json includes react and vite)
Tailwind CSS is installed and wired, and framer-motion is present for animation
Uses a separated architecture: a Deck/navigation component, a Slide frame, and multiple slide components registered in a slides index/array
Has a visible navigation slider (dot strip) AND a slide counter
Multiple distinct slides on the Context Engineering topic
Contains no text input, textarea, form, or Submit/Save controls
Slide content uses projection-legible sizes, not web-reading sizes for body text

evals.name: projection-typography
evals.prompt: Tạo một bài trình chiếu 5 slide về 'Vì sao slide hay bị chữ quá nhỏ và cách khắc phục'. Mình sẽ chiếu lên màn lớn cho khoảng 100 người ngồi trong hội trường.
evals.expected_output: A 5-slide deck (either track) that itself respects the projection typography floor — body text large enough to read from the back of a hall — with navigation + counter and no forms.
assertions: Produces a runnable deck of about 5 slides on the topic
The deck's own typography respects the projection floor: body text is large (no text-sm/text-base/16px/1rem for slide body), titles are very large
Has a visible navigation control AND a slide number/counter
Contains no text input, textarea, form, or Submit/Save controls
Designed as projection (one presenter controls; audience only views) rather than an interactive web app
